lede: A look at April 26 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Alex Sarr and Novlene Williams-Mills, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Erfurt school massacre
events.desc: Robert Steinhäuser kills 16 at Gutenberg-Gymnasium in Erfurt, Germany, before committing suicide.

events.title: Daulatpur–Saturia tornado
events.desc: The deadliest known tornado strikes Central Bangladesh, killing upwards of 1,300, injuring 12,000, and leaving as many as 80,000 homeless.

events.title: Tanganyika (1961–1964)
events.desc: Tanganyika and Zanzibar merge to form the United Republic of Tanzania.

events.title: Baltimore and Ohio Railroad
events.desc: Final run of the Baltimore and Ohio Railroad's Royal Blue from Washington, D.C., to New York City after 68 years, the first U.S. passenger train to use electric locomotives.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Heinrich Kreipe is captured by Allied commandos in occupied Crete.

events.title: Spanish Civil War
events.desc: Spanish Civil War: Guernica, Spain, is bombed by the German Condor Legion and the Italian Aviazione Legionaria.

events.title: Gestapo
events.desc: The Gestapo, the official secret police force of Nazi Germany, is established by Hermann Göring.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: Italy secretly signs the Treaty of London pledging to join the Allied Powers.

events.title: L'Aigle (meteorite)
events.desc: Thousands of meteor fragments fall from the skies of L'Aigle, France; the event convinces European scientists that meteors exist.

births.name: Jadwiga Staniszkis
births.line: Polish sociologist, political scientist, and academic (died 2024)

deaths.text: Jerry Apodaca, American politician, 24th Governor of New Mexico
Mas Oyama, Japanese martial artist, founded Kyokushin kaikan
Violette Morris, French footballer, shot putter, and discus thrower
Nano Nagle, Irish nun and educator, founded the Presentation Sisters

observances.text: Chernobyl disaster related observances: Day of Remembrance of the Chernobyl tragedy (Belarus)
Chernobyl disaster related observances: Memorial Day of Radiation Accidents and Catastrophes (Russia)
Christian feast day: Our Lady of Good Counsel
Christian feast day: Pope Anacletus and Marcellinus
